name: Oscilar
description: Oscilar offers an AI-native risk decisioning platform built by ex-Confluent engineers, unifying fraud prevention, credit underwriting and AML in one API. It supports real-time decisions with generative AI copilots to help risk teams tune ru

seo.title: Oscilar — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Oscilar: Oscilar offers an AI-native risk decisioning platform built by ex-Confluent engineers, unifying fraud prevention, credit underwriting and AML in one AP

when_to_use: AI-native risk decisioning API for fraud and credit fusion
Generative AI copilot for fraud rule tuning and review
Real-time AML transaction scoring for neobank compliance
No-code workflow builder for fraud prevention policy logic
Credit underwriting risk model with explainable AI output

pros: Unifies fraud, credit and AML under one API
GenAI copilots speed up rule authoring
Founded by strong infra engineering team
cons: Young platform with limited public references
Data providers still need to be contracted separately
Roadmap moving fast, features not all mature
review.verdict: A promising modern risk decisioning platform, best for teams willing to bet on a newer vendor.
review.best_for: Fintechs and lenders wanting one platform for fraud, credit and AML decisioning with GenAI tooling.
review.not_for: Risk-averse enterprises needing decades-long vendor track record and heavy compliance proof.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
